README: Verified metal events calendar — read by .agents/scripts/scan-events.cjs (monthly Event Scanner). RULES: only add events whose exact date is verified against the cited source (the adversarial dates-research batch or a primary/universally documented source). Dates are YYYY-MM-DD; if the day is not reliably documented use YYYY-MM and the scanner will skip it rather than guess. kind ∈ death-anniversary | birth | album-release | brand-founded. queryTokens drive the L1 (GSC) standing check; pageUrl (when set) switches the scanner to refresh-only mode for that page. tier: 'top' gates birthday events.

events.subject: Joey Jordison
factAnchors: Died July 26, 2021, aged 46
Founding Slipknot drummer, 1995–2013
Also Murderdolls, Scar the Martyr, Sinsaenum, Vimic
Disclosed acute transverse myelitis in 2016
Voted greatest drummer of the previous 25 years by Rhythm magazine readers (2010)

events.subject: Vinnie Paul
factAnchors: Died June 22, 2018, aged 54
Co-founder and drummer of Pantera; later Damageplan and Hellyeah
Brother of Dimebag Darrell (killed December 8, 2004)

events.subject: Slipknot — Iowa
factAnchors: Iowa released August 28, 2001 (Roadrunner Records)
Joey Jordison on drums; widely cited among the heaviest #1-charting albums (UK #1, US #3)

events.subject: Slayer — Reign in Blood
factAnchors: Reign in Blood released October 1986 (Def Jam) — THE EXACT DAY IS DISPUTED: Slayer's own 30th-anniversary post, Metal Archives and Discogs say October 7; Wikipedia and Last.fm list October 20 (CBS distribution refusal muddied the original release). Any page MUST state this ambiguity rather than assert one day as fact.
Dave Lombardo on drums; Angel of Death opens the album; produced by Rick Rubin

events.subject: Slipknot — Slipknot (debut)
factAnchors: Self-titled debut released June 29, 1999 (Roadrunner Records)
Joey Jordison on drums

events.subject: Metallica — Master of Puppets
factAnchors: Master of Puppets released March 3, 1986 (Elektra)
Lars Ulrich on drums; last album with Cliff Burton (died September 27, 1986)

events.subject: Joey Jordison
factAnchors: Born 1975-04-26 — Nathan Jonas 'Joey' Jordison, founding Slipknot drummer (#1)

factAnchors: Born 1964-03-11 — Vincent Paul Abbott, born in Abilene, Texas; Pantera co-founder/drummer

factAnchors: Born 1964-07-23 — Megadeth drummer 1989-1998 (Rust in Peace through Cryptic Writings)

events.subject: Nick Menza
factAnchors: Died 2016-05-21 — Collapsed on stage performing with OHM at The Baked Potato, Los Angeles area, and died that night aged 51 (suspected heart failure)

events.subject: Sean Reinert
factAnchors: Born 1971-05-27 — Sean Landon Reinert, Cynic co-founder and drummer on Death's Human (1991)

events.subject: Sean Reinert
factAnchors: Died 2020-01-24 — Found unresponsive at his San Bernardino County home on Friday, Jan 24, 2020, and pronounced dead, aged 48
